title: DSC106 Lab 1: Personal Portfolio
description: Built a personal portfolio website with dynamic project templating using JSON data and JavaScript. Implemented data-driven UI rendering with reusable components.

title: DSC106 Lab 2: Data Visualization
description: Created interactive data visualizations using D3.js and JavaScript. Explored different visualization techniques for exploring complex datasets.

title: Machine Learning Project
description: Developed a predictive model using Python and scikit-learn for classification tasks. Achieved 92% accuracy on test dataset with proper cross-validation.

title: Data Analysis Dashboard
description: Built an interactive dashboard using Pandas and matplotlib to analyze sales trends. Identified key insights that improved business decisions.

title: Web Scraping Project
description: Scraped and analyzed data from multiple sources using BeautifulSoup and requests. Created a comprehensive dataset for further analysis.

title: Statistics Analysis
description: Performed comprehensive statistical analysis on real-world datasets. Used hypothesis testing and regression analysis to draw meaningful conclusions.

title: Python Data Processing
description: Automated data processing pipeline using Python. Reduced manual data handling time by 80% with efficient scripts.

title: SQL Database Project
description: Designed and implemented a relational database schema. Created complex queries to extract and summarize business metrics.

title: Time Series Forecasting
description: Built time series models to forecast future trends. Compared ARIMA and LSTM approaches for optimal performance.

title: Clustering Analysis
description: Applied unsupervised learning techniques to segment customer data. Used K-means and hierarchical clustering for market analysis.

title: NLP Text Analysis
description: Implemented sentiment analysis and text classification using NLP techniques. Processed and analyzed thousands of text documents.

title: Data Storytelling Workshop
description: Created compelling data narratives for stakeholder presentations. Combined visualizations with clear explanations to drive insights home.
